# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security fixes are applied to the latest minor release on the `main` branch.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.1.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 0.1   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

Report suspected vulnerabilities privately via GitHub's
[private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/phpnl/mcp/security/advisories/new)
feature, or by emailing the maintainers at the contact listed on
[php.nl](https://php.nl).

Please include:

- A description of the issue and its potential impact
- Steps to reproduce (proof-of-concept code if available)
- The version/commit that is affected
- Any suggested fix or mitigation

You can expect an initial response within 7 days. We will keep you informed
as we investigate and work on a fix. Once a patch is released, we will
credit the reporter in the release notes unless anonymity is requested.
